@@ -1,1 +1,194 @@
- 
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";
+ import { useParams, useRouter } from "next/navigation";
+ import { AppLayout } from "@/components/AppLayout";
+ 
+ type SimulationData = {
+   uuid: string;
+   name: string;
+   description: string;
+   status: "pending" | "running" | "completed" | "failed";
+   created_at: string;
+   updated_at: string;
+ };
+ 
+ export default function SimulationDetailPage() {
+   const router = useRouter();
+   const params = useParams();
+   const uuid = params.uuid as string;
+   const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true);
+   const [simulation, setSimulation] = useState&lt;SimulationData | null&gt;(null);
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
+   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+ 
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchSimulation = async () =&gt; {
+       try {
+         setIsLoading(true);
+         setError(null);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/simulations/${uuid}&#96;, {
+           method: "GET",
+           headers: {
+             accept: "application/json",
+             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+           },
+         });
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           throw new Error("Failed to fetch simulation");
+         }
+ 
+         const data: SimulationData = await response.json();
+         setSimulation(data);
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching simulation:", err);
+         setError(
+           err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load simulation"
+         );
+       } finally {
+         setIsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     if (uuid) {
+       fetchSimulation();
+     }
+   }, [uuid]);
+ 
+   // Helper to get status badge styles
+   const getStatusBadge = (status: SimulationData["status"]) =&gt; {
+     const styles: Record&lt;SimulationData["status"], string&gt; = {
+       pending: "bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-500",
+       running: "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-500",
+       completed: "bg-green-500/20 text-green-500",
+       failed: "bg-red-500/20 text-red-500",
+     };
+     return styles[status] || "bg-muted text-muted-foreground";
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;AppLayout
+       activeItem="simulations"
+       onItemChange={(itemId) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/${itemId}&#96;)}
+       sidebarOpen={sidebarOpen}
+       onSidebarToggle={() =&gt; setSidebarOpen(!sidebarOpen)}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+         {/* Back button and Header */}
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-4"&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={() =&gt; router.push("/simulations")}
+             className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth={2}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                 d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold"&gt;
+               {isLoading ? "Loading..." : simulation?.name || "Simulation"}
+             &lt;/h1&gt;
+             {simulation &amp;&amp; (
+               &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground text-base leading-relaxed mt-1"&gt;
+                 {simulation.description}
+               &lt;/p&gt;
+             )}
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Content */}
+         {isLoading ? (
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 py-8"&gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+             &gt;
+               &lt;circle
+                 className="opacity-25"
+                 cx="12"
+                 cy="12"
+                 r="10"
+                 stroke="currentColor"
+                 strokeWidth="4"
+               &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 className="opacity-75"
+                 fill="currentColor"
+                 d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+               &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : error ? (
+           &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+               className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Retry
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : simulation ? (
+           &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+             {/* Status Badge */}
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+               &lt;span className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 Status:
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;span
+                 className={&#96;inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium capitalize ${getStatusBadge(
+                   simulation.status
+                 )}&#96;}
+               &gt;
+                 {simulation.status || "pending"}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Placeholder for simulation detail content */}
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-muted flex items-center justify-center mb-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-7 h-7 text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={1.5}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.348a1.125 1.125 0 010 1.971l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.667-.986V5.653z"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                 Simulation Details
+               &lt;/h3&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 Configure and run your simulation from here
+               &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         ) : null}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

+       {/* New Simulation Dialog */}
+       {dialogOpen &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;NewSimulationDialog
+           onClose={() =&gt; setDialogOpen(false)}
+           onCreateSimulation={navigateToSimulation}
+         /&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}
+       &lt;DeleteConfirmationDialog
+         isOpen={deleteDialogOpen}
+         onClose={closeDeleteDialog}
+         onConfirm={deleteSimulation}
+         title="Delete simulation"
+         message={&#96;Are you sure you want to delete "${simulationToDelete?.name}"?&#96;}
+         confirmText="Delete"
+         isDeleting={isSimulationDeleting}
+       /&gt;
+     &lt;/AppLayout&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
+ function NewSimulationDialog({
+   onClose,
+   onCreateSimulation,
+ }: {
+   onClose: () =&gt; void;
+   onCreateSimulation?: (simulationUuid: string) =&gt; void;
+ }) {
+   const [simulationName, setSimulationName] = useState("");
+   const [isCreating, setIsCreating] = useState(false);
+   const [error, setError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const maxLength = 50;
+ 
+   const handleCreate = async () =&gt; {
+     if (!simulationName.trim()) return;
+ 
+     try {
+       setIsCreating(true);
+       setError(null);
+       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+       if (!backendUrl) {
+         throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+       }
+ 
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/simulations&#96;, {
+         method: "POST",
+         headers: {
+           accept: "application/json",
+           "Content-Type": "application/json",
+           "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+         },
+         body: JSON.stringify({
+           name: simulationName.trim(),
+           description: "",
+         }),
+       });
+ 
+       if (!response.ok) {
+         throw new Error("Failed to create simulation");
+       }
+ 
+       const data = await response.json();
+       const simulationUuid = data.uuid;
+ 
+       if (simulationUuid &amp;&amp; onCreateSimulation) {
+         onClose(); // Close dialog first
+         onCreateSimulation(simulationUuid);
+       }
+     } catch (err) {
+       console.error("Error creating simulation:", err);
+       setError(
+         err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to create simulation"
+       );
+     } finally {
+       setIsCreating(false);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div
+       className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"
+       onClick={onClose}
+     &gt;
+       &lt;div
+         className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl p-8 max-w-lg w-full mx-4 shadow-lg"
+         onClick={(e) =&gt; e.stopPropagation()}
+       &gt;
+         {/* Header */}
+         &lt;div className="mb-6"&gt;
+           &lt;h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight mb-1"&gt;
+             Create your simulation
+           &lt;/h2&gt;
+           &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground text-[15px]"&gt;
+             Choose a name that reflects your simulation&amp;apos;s purpose
+           &lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Simulation Name Input */}
+         &lt;div className="mb-6"&gt;
+           &lt;label className="block text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground mb-2"&gt;
+             Simulation Name &lt;span className="text-red-500"&gt;*&lt;/span&gt;
+           &lt;/label&gt;
+           &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+             &lt;input
+               type="text"
+               value={simulationName}
+               onChange={(e) =&gt; {
+                 if (e.target.value.length &lt;= maxLength) {
+                   setSimulationName(e.target.value);
+                 }
+               }}
+               placeholder="Enter simulation name"
+               className="w-full h-10 px-3 pr-16 rounded-md text-[13px] border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+               maxLength={maxLength}
+             /&gt;
+             &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+               &lt;span className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 {simulationName.length}/{maxLength}
+               &lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Error Message */}
+         {error &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div className="mb-6 p-3 rounded-md bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20"&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-[13px] text-red-500"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+ 
+         {/* Footer Buttons */}
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={onClose}
+             className="h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium bg-muted text-foreground hover:bg-muted/80 transition-colors cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2"
+           &gt;
+             &lt;svg
+               className="w-4 h-4"
+               fill="none"
+               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth={2}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;path
+                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                 d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/svg&gt;
+             Back
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={handleCreate}
+             disabled={!simulationName.trim() || isCreating}
+             className="h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+           &gt;
+             {isCreating ? (
+               &lt;&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;circle
+                     className="opacity-25"
+                     cx="12"
+                     cy="12"
+                     r="10"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth="4"
+                   &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     className="opacity-75"
+                     fill="currentColor"
+                     d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                   &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 Creating...
+               &lt;/&gt;
+             ) : (
+               "Create Simulation"
+             )}
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
    );
  }
```

</details>

</tool-use>

All tasks are complete. Here's a summary of the changes I made:

1. **Created `/src/app/simulations/[uuid]/page.tsx`** - A new simulation detail page that:
   - Fetches simulation data by UUID from the backend
   - Shows a back button to return to the simulations list
   - Displays the simulation name, description, and status
   - Has a placeholder for future simulation configuration/content

2. **Updated `/src/app/simulations/page.tsx`** to:
   - Remove the sidebar-based add/edit flow
   - Add a `NewSimulationDialog` component (similar to `NewAgentDialog` in Agents)
   - The dialog has a name input with character limit (50 chars)
   - On create, it POSTs to the backend and navigates to the new simulation's detail page
   - Clicking on a simulation row now navigates to `/simulations/{uuid}` instead of opening a sidebar

The flow now works like the agents page:
1. Click "Add simulation" → Opens a dialog to enter the simulation name
2. Enter name and click "Create Simulation" → Creates the simulation via API and navigates to `/simulations/{uuid}`
3. Click on any simulation in the list → Navigates to its detail page at `/simulations/{uuid}`
